---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Photo Sorter
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other approaches you've thought about.

**How would this help your workflow?**
Explain how this feature would make photo culling faster or easier for you.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockups, or examples from other software.
